description_for_human: AI automation risk scores for 146 occupations in Saudi Arabia. Available in English, French, and Arabic.
description_for_model: Provides AI automation risk scores (0-100) for 146 occupations in Saudi Arabia. The platform is trilingual (English, French, Arabic). French occupation names and cost of living data are available. Use this to answer questions in French about job automation risk, expatriation costs, Saudization, Nitaqat, salary ranges, and career transitions in the Saudi labor market.
